<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate-compat-matrix.ts. Do not edit by hand. Run `pnpm run docs:compat`. -->
# Compatibility Matrix

## Node.js

| Version | Status     | Notes                              |
|---------|------------|------------------------------------|
| 24.x    | ✅ Supported | CI target; Lambda runtime          |
| < 24    | ❌ Unsupported | `engines` field enforces `>=24.0.0` |

> The root `package.json` declares `"node": ">=24.0.0"`. pnpm will refuse installs on older runtimes.

## Module Format

| Package           | ESM | CJS | Notes                                  |
|-------------------|-----|-----|----------------------------------------|
| `@junando/cdk` | ❌ | ✅ | CJS only |
| `@junando/core` | ✅ | ❌ | ESM only |
| `@junando/ingest` | ✅ | ✅ | Dual build via tsup |
| `@junando/webhook` | ❌ | ✅ | CJS only (tsup) |
| `@junando/worker` | ❌ | ✅ | CJS only (tsup) |

> All packages target **ES2022** (`tsconfig` `target`). TypeScript declarations are emitted for both ESM and CJS where applicable.

## AWS Lambda Runtime

| Runtime      | Status       | Notes                                    |
|--------------|--------------|------------------------------------------|
| `nodejs24.x` | ✅ Supported  | CDK deploys this runtime for all Lambdas |
| Others       | ❌ Not tested | CDK stack hardcodes `nodejs24.x` |

## Package Versions

| Package             | Current | Minimum peer |
|---------------------|---------|--------------|
| `@junando/cdk` | 0.1.0 | — |
| `@junando/core` | 0.8.2 | — |
| `@junando/ingest` | 0.8.2 | — |
| `@junando/webhook` | 0.8.2 | — |
| `@junando/worker` | 0.8.2 | — |

All packages are versioned in lockstep. Install the same version across packages to avoid type mismatches.

## Key Runtime Dependencies

| Dependency          | Version range | Used by                        |
|---------------------|---------------|--------------------------------|
| `@anthropic-ai/sdk` | `^0.32.0` | `@junando/core` |
| `@aws-sdk/client-sqs` | `^3.1045.0` | `@junando/ingest`, `@junando/webhook`, `@junando/worker` |
| `@aws-sdk/client-ssm` | `^3.600.0` | `@junando/worker` |
| `@google/generative-ai` | `^0.21.0` | `@junando/core` |
| `ioredis` | `^5.10.1` | `@junando/core`, `@junando/worker` |
| `prom-client` | `^15.1.3` | `@junando/core` |
| `zod` | `^3.23.0` | `@junando/core`, `@junando/ingest`, `@junando/webhook`, `@junando/worker` |

## pnpm

| Version | Status     |
|---------|------------|
| `pnpm@11.2.2` | ✅ Pinned via `packageManager` |
| >=9.0.0 | ✅ Supported (engines) |
| < 9     | ❌ Unsupported |

## NestJS

Junando does not depend on NestJS. The packages are framework-agnostic and can be used in any Node.js server (Express, Fastify, NestJS, plain Lambda handlers, etc.).
